sourceMovie.title: Wayne's World
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Wayne's World works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and music blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wayne's World clicked for you, Pitch Perfect (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and music, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Wayne's World?
faq.answer: Try Pitch Perfect, Pitch Perfect 2, Pitch Perfect 3—each shares DNA with Wayne's World while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Wayne's World?
faq.answer: Wayne's World (1992) is best described as Comedy, Music. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Wayne's World part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Wayne's World Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
